title: Solla Marantha Kathai
desc: Based on the novel 'Thalaikeezh Vigithangal' by Nanjil Nadan.

title: Aatha Un Koyilile
desc: Kasturi falls in love with Marudhu, who is reluctant to return her affection.

title: En Purushanthaan Enakku Mattumthaan
desc: Vatsala and Marudhu's married life takes a drastic turn when a woman moves in next door.

title: Vetrivel Sakthivel
desc: Sakthivel falls in love with Manju but her past becomes an obstacle in their union.

title: Marutha
desc: Bound by her sister-in-law's expectations, Meenakshi decides to reclaim her lost honour.

title: Thunichal
desc: A young man's obbsessive love for a woman takes a dark and murderous turn.

title: Eesa
desc: Eesa, a salt pan worker, hunts down his wife's killers with cold-blooded precision.

title: Shakthi
desc: After Shakti saves a minister's daughter, he gets forced to reveal his real identity.

title: Fillers
desc: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies.

title: Fillers
desc: This is short, engaging segments designed to entertain and inform viewers between programs. They feature a mix of fun, trivia, promos, and interactive content to keep the audience entertained.

title: Maraivaasi
desc: A billionaire's son poses as a regular employee in order to avenge his father's murder.

title: Kadhaludan
desc: When Kalyan falls for Kavitha without revealing his identity, a surprise changes his life.

title: Vetri Vizha
desc: A man suffers from amnesia after an accident and tries to get his life back together.

title: Appu
desc: Appu tries to hunt down his sister's murderer, a powerful pimp.

title: Gajendra
desc: A man's family questions him for unabashedly doting on a girl with a mental disability.

title: Arpudham
desc: After getting rejected by Priya, Ashok, a carefree man, resolves to change his life.

title: Pudhu Kudithanam
desc: Ashok is a very obedient son and his mother would like an equally submissive daughter-in-law so that she does not influence him. But Ashok secretly marries Nila, who actually dislikes this situation.

title: Murattu Kaathal
desc: Merlin is a pop star who meets Ramesh in a park. After a few events, she realises that he's an unhinged stalker. The reason for his behaviour is linked to his traumatic past and a song sung by Merlin.

title: Fillers
desc: This is short, engaging segments designed to entertain and inform viewers between programs. They feature a mix of fun, trivia, promos, and interactive content to keep the audience entertained.

title: Vazhve Mayam
desc: Raja does all it takes to woo Devi. Just when she agrees to marry him, she learns about his infidelity.
